texto: Alan! How many more times do I have to tell you? We do not say “see you soon” to customers when they leave our shop. We say “goodbye”, because they won’t be coming back, ever. When will you get that into your thick head?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jean Teulé que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Alan! How many more times do I have to tell you? We do not say “see you soon” to customers when t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, death, goodbye, com foco em termino e luto.

frase_original: Alan! How many more times do I have to tell you? We do not say “see you soon” to customers when they leave our shop. We say “goodbye”, because they won’t be coming back, ever. When will you get that into your thick head?

texto: Oh no!’ replies Monsieur Tuvache indignantly. ‘We’re not murderers, you know. You have to understand that’s prohibited. We supply what is needed but people do the deed themselves. It’s their affair. We are just here to offer a service by selling quality products,’ continues the shopkeeper, leading the customer towards the checkout.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jean Teulé sobre temas ligados a lideranca. A afirmação “Oh no!’ replies Monsieur Tuvache indignantly. ‘We’re not murderers, you know. You have to underst…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a lideranca, morality, suicide, útil em momentos de suicide.

frase_original: Oh no!’ replies Monsieur Tuvache indignantly. ‘We’re not murderers, you know. You have to understand that’s prohibited. We supply what is needed but people do the deed themselves. It’s their affair. We are just here to offer a service by selling quality products,’ continues the shopkeeper, leading the customer towards the checkout.

texto: She leaves, carrying a biodegradable carrier bag that reads THE SUICIDE SHOP on one side, and on the other: HAS YOUR LIFE BEEN A FAILURE? LET’S MAKE YOUR DEATH A SUCCESS!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jean Teulé que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “She leaves, carrying a biodegradable carrier bag that reads THE SUICIDE SHOP on one side, and on …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, death, failure, com foco em luto e failure.
